'''Gror Pernon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the brother of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Antbbianplourr III]] of [[Eiattu 6]] and the grand uncle of [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr Ilo]]. He was a member of the [[Priamsta]] and served as the [[Grand Duke]]. His son was [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Rial Pernon]]. While he supported the coup against his nephew, [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]], Pernon was unaware that he intended to murder the Royal Family.

He encouraged Plourr to return to Eiattu with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and take the throne following the appearance of [[Harrandatha Estillo (impostor)|the impostor]] [[Prince/Legends|prince]] [[Harrandatha Estillo|Harran]].
